Clinical Profile

Miss Han Bin Lee

Consultant Ophthalmic Surgeon
Advancing surgical excellence through digital integration and precision patient care to provide consultant-led treatment.

Miss Han Bin Lee is a UK-trained Consultant Ophthalmic Surgeon specialising in advanced cataract removal and corneal conditions. A graduate of University College London and a Fellow of the Royal College of Ophthalmologists (FRCOphth), she brings sub-specialist fellowship training from the renowned Corneoplastic Unit of Queen Victoria Hospital and Frimley Park Hospital to her practice.

By utilising state-of-the-art diagnostic imaging and high-precision micro-incision surgical technology, her practice is dedicated to achieving the highest standard of visual outcomes. Every procedure is delivered within a calm, reassuring and patient-focussed environment. As an active member of both the European Society of Cataract and Refractive Surgeons (ESCRS) and the British Society for Refractive Surgery (BSRS). These prestigious memberships reflect a strong commitment to continuous medical education, advanced surgical training, and the highest global standards in vision correction. Committed to shaping the future of her specialty, Miss Lee serves as a surgical trainer and clinical supervisor, actively mentoring and training the next generation of ophthalmic surgeons.

Miss Lee holds substantive consultant posts at Frimley Health NHS Foundation Trust. Her private practice operates across Parkside Frimley Park, Heatherwood Hospital, and Benenden Hospital, where she remains dedicated to delivering exceptional, patient-centred eye care.

Specialising in;

Complex cataract surgery Corneal conditions Dry eye management Extended Depth of Focus or Multifocal (EDOF) lenses Trifocal lenses Monofocal and Enhanced Monofocal (Monofocal Plus) lenses Premium lenses Toric lenses Trifocal Toric lenses YAG laser capsulotomy and more...
NHS base
Frimley Health NHS Foundation Trust, Camberley, Surrey · Heatherwood Hospital, Ascot, Berkshire
Private practice
Frimley, Parkside Hospital · Heatherwood, Parkside Hospital · Benenden Hospital
Qualifications
MBBS (University College London, 2012), BSc, FRCOphth, CertLRS
Fellowships
Corneoplastic Unit of Queen Victoria Hospital · Frimley Park Hospital
Academic
Former Honorary Clinical Lecturer at Brighton & Sussex Medical School
Han Bin Lee

Consultant Ophthalmologist specialising in cataract surgery and complex corneal conditions across the NHS and private practice.
